message:
fix(packs): add explicit tier ordering for cicd category

The cicd.github_actions pack was registered but cicd had no explicit
tier in pack_tier(), causing it to fall through to the unknown category
catchall. This fix:

- Adds "cicd" => 10 as an explicit tier (CI/CD tools)
- Bumps unknown categories to tier 11
- Adds test assertion for cicd.github_actions tier ordering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
